name: Raspberries in Honeyed Puree
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the raspberry puree and honey in a bowl.
2. Gently stir together the red and golden raspberries with the puree mixture.
3. Allow the mixture to marinate at room temperature for 1 hour (or refrigerate if preparing ahead; bring out of refrigerator 30 minutes before serving).
4. Serve the raspberries alone, or as a topping over ice cream or angel food cake.
Note: To make a raspberry puree, place a 10-ounce package of frozen raspberries in light syrup into a food processor or blender. Strain and use the puree.
